name: Moonpetal
lore: Pale-spotted leaves that seem to drink moonlight. Best harvested in fog.

name: Sleeper's Cap
lore: A spotted mushroom found in mossy hollows. Smells faintly of rain.

name: Hearthroot
lore: A gnarled root that radiates a soft warmth even when raw.

name: Skylark Frond
lore: A golden, feathered fern said to lift the spirit when steeped.

name: Eye of Newt
lore: Don't ask where these come from. Tradition demands their inclusion.

name: Wild Sage
lore: Pungent and grounding. Burned at thresholds; brewed for clear thought.
